title: [FIRRTL] crash in LowerLayers
body:
Got a random crash in LowerLayers in an unrelated PR [here](https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/10239144740/job/28324393501#step:10:2194).  Did not see anything wrong when running under valgrind. It is crashing on one of the calls to `lookupSymbolIn` which walks the circuit looking for a specific symbol.  I see some code that looks like we are creating modules in the circuit in parallel, but guarding it with a lock.  If we are searching the circuit for a layerblock while we are creating more modules, that could be an issue.  If that is the problem, then prepopulating a SymbolTable could help make the code run faster as well as solving the race condition.

```
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/lower-layers.mlir' FAILED ********************
Exit Code: 2
```
